meta.title: Zenythic — Casino games provider
meta.description: The next standard in casino gaming. Technology, mini-games and responsible play for operators worldwide.

hero.title: The next standard in casino gaming
hero.subtitle: We build fast, fair and mobile-first mini-games and gaming experiences. A single API to integrate a full catalogue into your platform.

trust.title: Built for operators who accept no compromises

games.title: Games built to retain
games.subtitle: A selection of our titles. The full catalogue is coming soon.

features.title: A platform built to scale
features.subtitle: Every technical decision is made so your operation grows without friction.

fair.title: Provably Fair
fair.desc: Verifiable, transparent randomness on every round. Trust by design.

mobile.title: Mobile-first
mobile.desc: Lightweight, responsive rendering. The same fluidity on any device.

i18n.title: Multi-language
i18n.desc: Native localisation, currencies and regional formats, effortlessly.

integration.title: 48h integration
integration.desc: A clean API and clear documentation. From zero to production in two days.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.desc: Built under responsible gaming standards and jurisdiction control.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.desc: A dedicated integration and operations team, always available.

solutions.title: Everything your operation needs
solutions.subtitle: A single partner for the catalogue, the integration and the control.

catalog.title: Games catalogue
catalog.desc: Mini-games, crash and original Zenythic titles. Continuous updates.

api.title: Integration API
api.desc: Connect your platform with a single, well-documented REST endpoint.

backoffice.title: Back-office
backoffice.desc: Full control: players, sessions, reports and real-time configuration.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.desc: Performance, retention and revenue metrics per game and market.

tech.title: One API. Frictionless integration.
tech.subtitle: We designed integration so your engineering team loves it: clean, predictable and fast.

points.iframe: Mount each game with a signed, secure iframe.
points.sdk: Web and mobile SDK with included types.
points.webhook: Real-time webhooks for every relevant event.
points.sandbox: Sandbox environment with unlimited test data.

cta.title: Become a Zenythic partner
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about bringing the next standard in gaming to your platform.

footer.tagline: The next standard in casino gaming.
footer.disclaimer: Zenythic is a B2B games provider for licensed operators. Play responsibly. +18.
